meta.title: Sacred Heart Catholic Church
meta.subTitle: Archdiocesan Restructuring
meta.description: Archdiocese of Detroit's Restructuring Information for Sacred Heart Catholic Church, Auburn Hills, MI
meta.keywords: Sacred Heart Catholic Church, Auburn Hills, Michigan, Archdiocese of Detroit, Restructuring, Archdiocesan Restructuring

subHead: Who is involved in our Parish?

sessions.title: Parish Listening Sessions
bullets: Two parish listening sessions will be held in every parish in the Archdiocese of Detroit.
At these sessions will be a review of potential pastoral models along with feedback.
Every parish in the AOD will experience change in some way because of the process.
Feedback will identify which proposed changes would better serve the people of God.

bullets.text: Our parish listening sessions will be:

bullets: Register to help us plan for the sessions and receive a copy of the presentation and follow-up survey once all listening sessions in our area are completed. We are part of Planning Area 10.

prep.title: Preparing for Our Parish Listening Sessions:

bullets.name: Pray
bullets.urlTitle: the Prayer for Restructuring the AOD
bullets.text: as we go through this process. Intercede for those preparing for the listening sessions, those who will attend and provide feedback.
bullets.mobileText: as we go through this process.

bullets.name: Review
bullets.text: Sacred Heart’s Parish Workbook and the workbooks of any other parish in Planning Area 10 that you want to know more about. These documents were compiled to provide transparency and inform the restructuring process. Understanding this information helps each of us enter this time of discernment with a deeper sense of awareness around the need for restructuring. Workbooks for all parishes in the AOD can be found
bullets.mobileText: our Parish Workbook or any Planning Area 10 Parish Workbooks

bullets.name: Reflect
bullets.text: and take time to name your feelings about restructuring. Are you feeling anxious? Fearful? Angry? Excited? Hopeful? Ask the Lord to open your heart to be receptive to where he is leading our parish and the entire Archdiocese of Detroit. Be prepared to share your thoughts about how the proposed models will impact the AOD vision of Vibrant Parishes, Flourishing Priests and being Mission Ready.
bullets.mobileText: and take time to name your feelings about restructuring.
